values.value: select Account.Name, Account.Type, Account.CategoryL1__c, Account.CategoryL2__c, Account.HealthAuthority__c, Account.FacilityCHSAText__c, Account.PHOCSParentAccount__c, Account.Phone, Account.PHOCSOutstandingViolations__c, Account.OperatingMonths__c, Account.Physical_Address__c, Name, ActualVisitStartTime, TestInspType__c, PHOCSViolationCount__c,Account.PhysicalLocation__c From visit WHERE Id = :recordId LIMIT 1
